set.body: Phase 5 fresh-eyes walkthrough: normal Rscript file.R printed the documented MLX-ready startup note, but with AMATRIX_MLX_PROBE_GPU=0 AMATRIX_OPENCL_PROBE_GPU=0, a file-entry script that constructed adgeMatrix(..., mode="fast") and called amatrix_backend_plan() crashed with libc++abi terminating due to uncaught cl::Error clGetDeviceIDs. This contradicts the documented expectation that bad driver/backend probing is contained. Minimal repro first, then ensure probe-disabled planning degrades to CPU/status messaging without crashing.
set.title: Fix Rscript file-entry crash when GPU probes are disabled
